heroDescription: Multidisciplinary digital designer blending branding, illustration, web design, and creative technology into bold visual experiences.

whatIDo.label: Brand Identity
whatIDo.description: Creating logos, visual systems, and branding that help businesses, communities, and creative projects stand out with a strong and memorable identity. I focus on combining style, personality, and clear visual communication to build branding that feels unique and recognisable.

whatIDo.label: Graphic Design
whatIDo.description: Designing digital and print visuals including posters, merchandise, promotional graphics, social media content, and marketing materials. My work combines bold layouts, typography, and creative direction to create visuals that are both eye-catching and effective.

whatIDo.label: Digital Illustration
whatIDo.description: Producing custom illustrations and digital artwork inspired by storytelling, character design, alternative aesthetics, and expressive visual styles. My illustration work ranges from personal creative projects to commission-based artwork and promotional visuals.

whatIDo.label: Community & Digital Projects
whatIDo.description: Developing creative projects that support online communities, collaborative spaces, and digital experiences. This includes design-led tools, Discord community concepts, branding support, and experimental ideas that blend creativity with technology.

whatIDo.label: Visual Storytelling
whatIDo.description: Combining design, imagery, layout, and narrative to create visuals that communicate emotion, personality, and ideas. I aim to create work that feels engaging, memorable, and connected to the audience through strong visual storytelling.

whatIDo.label: Creative Coding
whatIDo.description: Using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and digital tools to experiment with interactive ideas, creative projects, and online experiences. I enjoy combining technical problem-solving with creativity to build projects that are both functional and visually engaging.

featuredSection.title: Featured Work
featuredSection.description: A selection of recent projects showcasing digital art, web development, and creative problem-solving.

aboutSection.title: Design, Code, And Loud Visuals.
aboutSection.summary: I’m Kyle De Vares, a multidisciplinary digital designer with experience in branding, illustration, web development, and creative media. From visual identity and digital artwork to coding interactive projects, I combine creativity and technical skills to build engaging digital experiences. I’m always exploring new tools, styles, and creative approaches that push my work further.
